title: You Can't Control Interest Rates, But You Can Control What You Do About Them
text: Inflation remains elevated, and the Federal Reserve is raising rates to keep it in check. Increasing interest rates can significantly impact savers and investors.

title: 2 Safe Dividend Stocks to Beat Inflation
text: Reduced buying power is a material issue to consider with regard to dividends. Adding dividend stocks that have rapid growth can help offset the risk inflation poses.

title: Fastenal Falls To The Buy Zone: But Wait To Buy More
text: Fastenal NASDAQ: FAST fell following its Q2 earnings release and could fall further. The caveat is that tepid results do not overshadow the company's strengths, including a solid balance sheet, an improvement in cash flow, share repurchases, and dividend payments.

title: Fastenal (FAST) Q2 Earnings In Line, Sales Miss, Shares Down
text: Fastenal's (FAST) Q2 results reflect the slowing down of industrial markets. Yet, increasing digital footprint is positive.

title: Fastenal Company (FAST) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 13, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Taylor Ranta - Investor Relations Dan Florness - President & Chief Executive Officer Holden Lewis - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants David Manthey - Baird Michael Hoffman - Stifel Chris Dankert - Loop Capital Markets Ryan Merkel - William Blair Josh Pokrzywinski - Morgan Stanley Tommy Moll - Stephens Operator Good morning and welcome to Fastenal 2023 Second Quarter Earnings Conference Call. [Operator Instructions] As a reminder, this conference is being recorded.

title: Fastenal shares slip as 2Q earnings fall short of expectations
text: Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) shares moved lower after it reported a second quarter earnings miss as the wholesale distributor of industrial and construction supplies continues to recover from supply chain disruptions.  It posted earnings per share of $0.52, below the Street's expectation of $0.53.

title: Fastenal (FAST) Q2 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Fastenal (FAST) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Fastenal (FAST) Q2 Earnings Match Estimates
text: Fastenal (FAST) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.52 per share, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. This compares to earnings of $0.50 per share a year ago.

title: Fastenal Releases 2023 Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Report
text: WINONA, Minn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fastenal Company (Nasdaq: FAST) is proud to announce the publication of its 2023 ESG Report. title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - Cruising Towards A 20% Return
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio is a strategy that leverages the stock selection process of Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF™, with a few minor twists. The portfolio gained 5.00% in June, underperforming the S&P 500 by 1.60%. Year-to-date, the portfolio is up 11.99% and trailing the S&P 500 by 4.90%. Since inception, the portfolio is generating 3.56% of alpha over the S&P 500.

title: Here's Why Fastenal Is a No-Brainer Dividend Growth Stock
text: The company makes fasteners and other supplies that are vital to its customers. Fastenal has a long history of steady revenue, earnings, and dividend growth.

title: Fastenal (FAST) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
text: Fastenal (FAST) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
